data.title: Cuscal plans dual share issues to raise fresh equity capital
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Cuscal Limited ( (AU:CCL) ) is now available.

Cuscal Limited has outlined plans for two equity issues, comprising a securities purchase plan to issue up to 750,000 ordinary fully paid shares and a separate placement or other type of issue for up to 7,500,000 shares. The new securities, scheduled for issue between 20 April and 13 May 2026, signal a meaningful capital raising that could strengthen Cuscal’s balance sheet, expand its funding capacity and potentially dilute existing shareholders while broadening its investor base.

The securities purchase plan is set with a record date of 13 April 2026 and will close on 6 May 2026, allowing eligible investors to participate directly in the capital raising. Alongside the larger placement component, the dual-structure offer underscores Cuscal’s use of the ASX capital markets to support its future corporate and operational needs, with timing and structure designed to provide flexibility in tapping both institutional and retail demand.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:CCL) stock is a Buy with a A$5.13 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cuscal Limited stock, see the AU:CCL Stock Forecast page.

More about Cuscal Limited

Cuscal Limited, listed on the ASX under the code CCL, operates as a publicly traded company that issues ordinary fully paid shares. Its activities place it within the broader financial and capital markets ecosystem, with a shareholder base accessed through structured equity offerings on the Australian Securities Exchange.

Average Trading Volume: 486,738

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$831.4M

data.title: Winton Wins Fast-Track Approval for Ayrburn Film Studio Hub
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Winton Land Limited ( (AU:WTN) ) just unveiled an update.

Winton Land Limited has secured conditional fast-track approval for its Ayrburn Screen Hub project under New Zealand’s Fast-track Approvals Act 2024, with an Expert Panel issuing a final decision that is still subject to a 20-working-day appeal period. The company says the hub, positioned near the Ayrburn Hospitality Precinct and Northbrook Arrowtown between Arrowtown and Lake Hayes, will be an all-inclusive film studio and accommodation complex designed to bolster New Zealand’s film and television infrastructure.

The Ayrburn Screen Hub will allow film productions to work and stay on-site through filming, production and post-production, offering studio buildings, workrooms, office space, dressing rooms, a screening room, meeting facilities and 201 accommodation units for film workers and visitors when no productions are underway. Winton’s Queenstown general manager, Lauren Christie, said the development is expected to generate meaningful employment and economic growth for the region while also delivering further improvements to water quality on the wider Ayrburn site.

More about Winton Land Limited

Winton Land Limited is a residential land developer specialising in integrated, fully masterplanned neighbourhoods across 12 masterplanned communities. Its portfolio comprises about 20 projects expected to deliver roughly 5,750 residential lots, dwellings, apartments, retirement village units and commercial lots, and the company is dual-listed on the NZX and ASX.

Learn more about WTN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Legend Mining flags strong gold targets and solid cash ahead of Pinnacle Well drilling
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Legend Mining Limited ( (AU:LEG) ) just unveiled an update.

Legend Mining reported a productive March 2026 quarter at its Pinnacle Well Project near Leonora, driven by completion of induced polarisation geophysical surveys at the Alpha North and Pyrophyllite Hill prospects. The company ended the period with a cash balance of $10.2 million, supported by an $811,000 R&D refund, providing a solid funding base for upcoming drilling.

Survey work at Alpha North defined coincident chargeable and resistive features over a 700-metre strike, aligned with anomalous geochemistry, quartz veining, historic gold workings and significant regional shears, materially enhancing the area’s gold prospectivity. At Pyrophyllite Hill, a 600-metre NW-SE trending chargeability-resistivity anomaly consistent with key regional structures suggests disseminated sulphides and silica alteration at depth, with drill program approvals underway and field drilling targeted to commence in July 2026.

More about Legend Mining Limited

Legend Mining Limited is an Australian mineral exploration company focused on gold and base metals in Western Australia. Its key assets include the Pinnacle Well Project in the Leonora District, targeting intrusive-related and structurally controlled vein-hosted gold and VMS-style zinc-copper-lead-silver mineralisation, along with interests in the Rockford project in the Fraser Range for nickel, copper, zinc, silver and gold.

Average Trading Volume: 754,433

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$26.23M

For a thorough assessment of LEG stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Sandon Capital Investments Limited ( (AU:SNC) ) just unveiled an update.

Sandon Capital Investments Limited has updated its dividend notification for its ordinary fully paid shares, clarifying details of a distribution relating to the month-long period ending 30 April 2026. The record date is set for 14 April 2026, with an ex-dividend date of 13 April 2026 and payment to follow as scheduled.

data.title: TMK Energy Highlights Mongolian Gas Potential at Gurvantes XXXV
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from TMK Energy Limited ( (AU:TMK) ) is now available.

TMK Energy Limited has outlined the resource potential of its Gurvantes XXXV coal seam gas project in Mongolia, positioning natural gas as a new and significant energy supply option for the country. Independent assessments by Netherland, Sewell & Associates confirm substantial contingent and prospective gas resources, classified under international petroleum resource standards.

The company emphasizes that these resources, estimated using both deterministic and probabilistic methods, remain unchanged from prior disclosures and continue to be supported by the same technical assumptions. By validating the scale and quality of its gas assets, TMK Energy is reinforcing its strategic case for developing domestic gas in Mongolia, which could enhance energy security and create new opportunities for investors and stakeholders if commercial production is achieved.

More about TMK Energy Limited

TMK Energy Limited is an ASX-listed energy company focused on natural gas development in Mongolia, particularly coal seam gas resources. The company targets the Gurvantes XXXV CSG Project, aiming to unlock significant gas reserves that could become a new domestic energy supply for the Mongolian market and potentially for regional customers.

Average Trading Volume: 433,511

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$45.74M

An update from EBR Systems, Inc. Shs Chess Depository Interests Repr 1 Sh ( (AU:EBR) ) is now available.

EBR Systems, Inc. has disclosed changes in the security holdings of director Allan Will following the completion of a reverse stock split implemented on 10 April 2026. The adjustment significantly reduced the number of options and warrants held directly by Will, while his and his partner Taphne Lux’s holdings of CHESS depository interests remain unchanged, reflecting a technical restructuring rather than a new investment or divestment.

The notice underscores that the change in Will’s relevant interests arises purely from the corporate action, with no cash consideration involved. For investors, the filing clarifies the post-split capital position of a key director, enhancing transparency around governance and ownership concentration as the company recalibrates its share structure.

data.title: Orbital UAV Wins New Indian Engine Order and Expands Global Drone Footprint
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Orbital Corporation Limited ( (AU:OEC) ).

Orbital UAV has secured a new order from India’s Dynamatic Technologies for its 350HFE propulsion system to power the Super Cheel UAV, expanding an existing partnership that already covers the 150HFE engine for the Cheel tactical drone. The Cheel platform, designed for advanced reconnaissance in harsh environments, is undergoing flight testing with Indian Defence Forces, positioning Orbital as a key foreign propulsion supplier within an otherwise domestic Indian UAV supply chain.

The Super Cheel variant aims to meet more demanding missions such as the Indian Navy’s long-range surveillance needs, with future production volumes dependent on adoption by India’s military. Orbital also recently signed a five-year distribution deal to supply 50HFE engines into the UAE and received an order from Australia’s Freespace Operations, where its 150HFE engine is set to extend heavy-lift drone endurance from about 40 minutes to over three hours, broadening its reach into emerging defence and logistics drone segments.

More about Orbital Corporation Limited

Orbital Corporation Limited, trading as Orbital UAV, is an Australian aerospace company specialising in heavy-fuel, two-stroke propulsion systems for unmanned aerial vehicles used in defence and commercial applications. Its engines are designed to enhance endurance, fuel standardisation, and lifecycle sustainment for tactical and heavy-lift drone platforms across global markets, including India, the UAE, and Australia.

Average Trading Volume: 473,320

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: A$25.07M

Simble Solutions Ltd. ( (AU:SIS) ) has issued an update.

Simble Solutions has disclosed a change in the shareholding of director Stephen Thornhill following an issue of securities approved by shareholders. Thornhill acquired 4,000,000 ordinary shares at $0.005 each and 1,333,334 unlisted options exercisable at $0.01, which mature in April 2029.

Following the transaction, Thornhill’s holding increased to 19,031,111 ordinary shares and a total of 11,333,334 unlisted options across two series. The new securities were issued on the same terms as those offered to unrelated placement participants, indicating alignment between director and broader investor pricing in the recent capital raising.

More about Simble Solutions Ltd.

Simble Solutions Limited is an Australia-based company listed on the ASX. The firm operates in the technology and software sector, though this notice focuses specifically on director shareholdings rather than detailing its product suite or customer markets.
